description_long: This is a high-top athletic sneaker featuring a bold and dynamic color scheme with orange, black, white, and yellow-green accents. The upper is primarily orange with black overlays and intricate white geometric patterns along the sides and heel. The toe box and heel display a stylized starburst graphic in red and black, adding a unique visual flair. The midsole is thick and segmented, colored in a muted yellow-green, providing both cushioning and a modern aesthetic. Black laces are threaded through reinforced eyelets, and the collar is padded for comfort and ankle support. The overall design suggests a blend of streetwear fashion and performance functionality, suitable for urban environments.
description: A vibrant high-top sneaker with orange, black, and white panels, geometric patterns, and a thick yellow-green sole, featuring starburst graphics on the toe and heel.
description_view_0: Side view showing the orange upper, black overlays, white geometric pattern, and starburst graphic near the heel.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the black laces, orange perforated toe box, and starburst graphic at the toe.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar color blocking, geometric pattern, and visible midsole structure.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the padded collar, starburst graphic on the heel, and layered color design.
